text: Here's what science actually says about hospital acquired infections. These infections happen to patients during their stay, often from bacteria present in healthcare settings. Over 1 in 30 hospitalized patients experience one. Surprised? Common culprits include MRSA and C. difficile, which thrive in sterile environments. Researchers are racing to find new methods to combat these infections. Stay informed! Hit that like button for more science insights.
